text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second! Why're you trying to scout someone who just lost
big-time?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try scouting Kitasan Black right after her loss in the scrimmage.
Rather than excitement, she responds with bewilderment.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y'know, I did lose and all, so what about me got you interested?
choice_data_list: ...I liked the look in your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You picked me for my looks? Um, I'm happy you were watching
me that closely, but I was sort of hoping you liked my running...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I don't even have the right to be scouted yet. I'm just a
newbie...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but you're a trainer, so that means you're a specialist, right?
Could I ask you some stuff about my running? Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame about my scouting offer, but I agree to hear her out some
other time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The appointed time comes and goes, but Kitasan Black is nowhere in
sight. She didn't seem like the type to break a promise...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Mr. Sumo Wrestler, did you twist your ankle? I guess lending
you my shoulder won't help much, will it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Here, I'll carry you. Don't be shy—I've got good shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Your puppy ran away?! Wait, is it that German shepherd over
there? All righty, here I go...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! Your truck won't move?! And inside... you've got relief
supplies?! Then we have to hurry!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
How about this—I'll carry the supplies! Don't worry, it's only twenty
kilometers round trip! Piece of cake!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry... It's already this late, too... Whenever I see someone in
need, I just can't stop myself from helping them out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, I gave a sumo wrestler a piggyback ride, caught a puppy, and carried some relief supplies. None of them took too long, but all together... I'm so, so sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like Kitasan Black isn't just well-mannered, but an altruist, to
boot. I decide to let her tardiness slide and hear her out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So how can I run better during races? The races here at Tracen are
different from what I'm used to, and I feel like I'm completely out of
my element.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I know I have to change something, but I don't know where to start, or what I should even work on...
choice_data_list:
Well, for starters, what do you think your
strengths are?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My strengths! Right... Hmm, I've always acted based on my instincts,
so I've never thought about that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm, which means... I need to learn more about myself. And to do that,
I need—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Strong rivals! Got it! In short... I have to race against lots of tough
opponents!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I organize a scrimmage for Kitasan Black, inviting only the cream of
the crop.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita! Today, I'm racing you.. and another, right? You know—the
legend herself!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... If I want to figure out what my strengths are, then I've got to
race against the best of the best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the wait, Kita. I was informed that you wish to learn
what your own merits are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A fine motive—I will lend you my assistance. We have a 3,000-meter
run ahead of us, so please show me all the abilities in your arsenal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kitasan Black's scrimmage with Tracen Academy's top
stayer—Mejiro McQueen—kicks off.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(W-wow... She hasn't slowed down this whole time... That's McQueen
for you!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Huh?! She's getting farther away? And I can't... catch up?! Nnngh!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Now! Kita—you're on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (Dia?! Was she just biding her time in the back?! No way!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I don't want to lose, not again! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, Kitasan Black finishes in third place.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I'm pathetic. I lost to McQueen in stamina, and Dia in terms of
strategy...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, I haven't figured out anything! If this keeps up, how will I
ever inspire others through my racing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Running like this won't encourage anyone. I'll never be like my dad at
this rate...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. My dad is an enka singer. He's got fans and pupils that really
respect him...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dad's popular for a reason. He knows when others are going through
rough times, and he's never afraid to extend a helping hand.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Singing and racing are different, but I still want to be like him. I want
to be someone who can inspire others and brighten up their day...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But if I can't even figure out my own strengths, then there's no way
that'll ever happen. All I'm good for... is helping others with small
chores.
choice_data_list: I think that's quite respectable already.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But anyone can do stuff like that, right? Basically, I'm just a bit of a
busybody.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My heart aches seeing Kitasan Black get so down on herself. Sure, her
shortcomings might've been exposed in today's race, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
How about this—I'll carry the supplies! Don't worry, it's only twenty
kilometers roundtrip! Piece of cake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was late to our meeting because she helped a few people out
along the way. To her, it wasn't anything special...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But those small chores might conceal the hint she's looking for.
Following this train of thought, I decide to tackle the problem with a
new approach.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm, this is quite troubling... Either I wait for warmer weather, or...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, what's on your mind? Ah, I know—didn't you race Kita the
other day? Is it about that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That case has already been settled. Currently, I'm worried about our
mountaintop villa.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It appears that the generator there is malfunctioning. Were it not for
the snow, I could have carried over a new one as part of my training...
choice_data_list: Hey... can I ask for a favor?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hm? You're... that trainer from last time. What's up?
choice_data_list:
About your problem—could you let Kitasan
handle it?

About your problem—could you let Kitasan
handle it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sorry?! You want Kitasan Black to do it? But what for?
